title: ウララ的トレーニング

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to think of a plan to get her to focus. One
day, I spot Haru Urara joyfully helping out the
shopkeepers of the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara talks about how much she loves to
help others. Hearing that, I devise a training
program that also acts as a way to help the
shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And to keep her interested, I don't call it training,
but refer to it as a series of contests. The plan is
foolproof.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My idea succeeds at getting Haru Urara to train
hard.
